textPlain: Interesting concept, but they should define mob programming on the landing page instead of having to dig into links.
This website hasn’t been updated in a while, perhaps we should add (2018) to the title.
Can be fun sometimes. Especially if you rowdy team and debates start happening.
> Mob Programming is a fairly new concept.I wonder what it is, even

Wikipedia quotes Marcus Hammarberg:> The basic concept of mob programming is simple: the entire team works as a team together on one task at the time. That is: one team – one (active) keyboard – one screen (projector of course).https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Team_programming#Mob_program...The website from this hn submission seems last updated 7 years ago, perhaps the term was more popular back then.
